scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    TRIM(CAST(boleta_id AS NVARCHAR))   AS boleta_id,
    TRIM(CAST(control_id AS NVARCHAR)) AS control_id,
    TRIM(ci_beneficiaria)               AS ci_beneficiaria,
    TRIM(nro_boleta)                   AS nro_boleta,
    TRIM(fecha_emision)                AS fecha_emision,
    TRIM(estado)                       AS estado
FROM bronze.sup_boletas',
source1 derive(boleta_id = iif(isNull(boleta_id) || trim(boleta_id) == '' || isError(toInteger(trim(boleta_id))), -1, toInteger(trim(boleta_id))),

derivedColumn1 derive(nro_boleta = iif(isNull(nro_boleta) || trim(replace(nro_boleta, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(nro_boleta, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), trim(replace(nro_boleta, '"', ''))),

fecha_emision = iif(isNull(fecha_emision) || trim(replace(fecha_emision, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(fecha_emision, '"', ''))) == 'NULL' || upper(trim(replace(fecha_emision, '"', ''))) == 'N/D', toDate('1900-01-01'), coalesce(toDate(trim(replace(fecha_emision, '"', '')), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_emision, '"', '')), 'dd/MM/yyyy'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_emision, '"', '')), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_emision, '"', '')), 'dd-MM-yyyy'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_emision, '"', '')), 'yyyyMMdd'))),

estado = case(     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'VIGENTE', 'VIGENTE',     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'CANJEADA' || upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'CANJE', 'CANJEADA',     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'VENCIDA' || upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'VENCIDO', 'VENCIDA',     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'ANULADA' || upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'ANULADO', 'ANULADA',     isNull(estado) || trim(replace(estado, '"', '')) == '', toString(null()),     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) )) ~> derivedColumn2
